source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Soft editorial English UI with calm numeric rhythm and Japanese typography guidance for refined product screens.
layout: Generous editorial grids, fig-leaf panels, seed-grain texture, 8px radii, quiet cards, and soft data hierarchy.

prompts.label: Transparent fig fruit and leaf motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Fig transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a fig fruit and leaf motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A Mediterranean fig branch with one whole fig and one cut fig showing rose flesh, tiny golden seeds, fig-purple skin, milky pith, broad lobed leaf-green fig leaves, and warm bark stem. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, soft edible texture, unmistakably fig.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include whole fruit, cut fruit, lobed leaves, and short branch without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no plum, no passionfruit, no pomegranate, no grape cluster, no plate, no hand, no props, no landscape, no text, no watermark, no second plant species.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Fig light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Fig", derived from the visible fig fruit and leaf cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible soft editorial UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Fig, Fig Fruit and Leaf, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from fig-purple skin, rose fruit flesh, golden seed texture, milky pith, broad leaf-green fig leaves, bark umber stems, and Mediterranean grove warmth. The board must read as fig, not plum or passionfruit.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, milky pith surfaces, fig-purple primary actions, flesh-rose accents, seed-gold highlights, leaf-green success states, bark dividers, fig seed-grain texture.
Constraints: no plum identity, no passionfruit flower, no pomegranate seeds, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Fig", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Fig dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Fig". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the fig fruit and leaf cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Fig, Fig Fruit and Leaf, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve fig system language: fig-purple actions, rose flesh highlights, seed-gold accents, leaf-green controls, bark-umber borders, pith-cream text, fig seed texture, 8px radius, precise shadcn/tweakcn component grid. Must read as fig, not plum or passionfruit.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: dark fig skin and bark surfaces, pith-cream foreground, fig-purple active states, rose and seed-gold chart highlights, leaf green focus/control accents, soft editorial contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no plum identity, no passionfruit flower, no pomegranate imagery, no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Fig".
